benchmark_notes: MuSiQue uses support paragraphs packaged with each question instance.
Answer EM/F1 is computed against the provided answer aliases; Ragas uses the benchmark support paragraphs as reference contexts.

samples.query: Along with the Closer performer, what notable pop artist started out his career on adult contemporary radio?
samples.answer: Along with Josh Groban, Michael Bublé started out his career on adult contemporary radio. Most artists became established in other formats before moving to adult contemporary, but Michael Bublé and Josh Groban started out as AC artists [Doc: Adult contemporary music, Section: General].

samples.query: Who did the creator of Derech Mitzvosecha follow?
samples.answer: The creator of Derech Mitzvosecha, Rabbi Menachem Mendel Schneersohn, followed Rabbi Dovber Schneuri. Chaya Mushka Schneersohn was the daughter of Rabbi Dovber Schneuri, the second Rebbe of the Chabad Hasidic movement, and the wife of Rabbi Menachem Mendel Schneersohn, the third Rebbe [Doc: Chaya Mushka Schneersohn, Section: General].

samples.query: Where is the location of the headquarters of the publisher of Bamboo Among the Oaks?
samples.answer: The headquarters of the publisher of Bamboo Among the Oaks is near downtown Saint Paul, Minnesota. The Minnesota Historical Society Press published Bamboo Among the Oaks, and the Minnesota History Center serves as the headquarters of the Minnesota Historical Society near downtown Saint Paul, Minnesota [Doc: Bamboo Among the Oaks, Section: General][Doc: Minnesota History Center, Section: General].
